videos.title: Easy DC English - Night Hike FAIL in Sierra de Guadarrama | Surviving Navacerrada to Cercedilla
videos.description:
Join us on a *chaotic—and hilarious—nighttime hiking adventure* through the stunning *Sierra de Madrid!* What starts as a peaceful walk from *Puerto de Navacerrada* to *Cercedilla* quickly spirals into a *race against darkness,* dwindling water supplies, and some very questionable navigation choices.

🌄 *Perfect for:*
✔ Hikers in Madrid looking for new routes
✔ Travellers exploring Spain’s wild side
✔ Anyone who loves real (unfiltered!) outdoor adventures

*What went wrong?*
☀️ A *late start* + filming delays = sunset panic
💧 *Running out of water* (and forgetting the water filter—oops!)
🌲 *Lost in the woods?* Navigating rocky trails in near-total darkness
🚂 *Will we make the last train?* (Spoiler: It’s very close…)

*Why watch?*
✅ *Stunning scenery* – Camino Schmidt, Siete Picos, and hidden meadows
✅ *Honest hiking challenges* – No sugar-coating, just real mishaps
✅ *Tips for your own hike* – What not to do in the Sierra de Guadarrama!

#Hiking #sierrademadrid  #NightHike #Navacerrada #Cercedilla #SpainTravel

👉 *Like, comment & subscribe* for more unfiltered adventures (and lessons learned the hard way!). Got a hiking disaster story? Share yours below! ⛰️

*Sorry* about the sound quality, it’s still early on and we’re still learning how to do this. But we have new equipment now, so this problem should be minimal in the future.

Chapters:
00:00 - Before the Nightmare!
00:26 - To Puerto de Navacerrada
01:08 - Camino Schmidt
02:22 - Admiring the view
03:09 - Carpaccio Time! Yum!
04:53 - Where's the sun going??!!
07:09 - R.I.P. Crystal
07:47 - Outro
